요한복음 13:1.content: Now before the feast of the Passover, Jesus, knowing that his time had come that he would depart from this world to the Father, having loved his own who were in the world, he loved them to the end.

요한복음 13:2.content: During supper, the devil having already put into the heart of Judas Iscariot, Simon’s son, to betray him,

요한복음 13:3.content: Jesus, knowing that the Father had given all things into his hands, and that he came from God, and was going to God,

요한복음 13:4.content: arose from supper, and laid aside his outer garments. He took a towel and wrapped a towel around his waist.

요한복음 13:5.content: Then he poured water into the basin, and began to wash the disciples’ feet and to wipe them with the towel that was wrapped around him.

요한복음 13:6.content: Then he came to Simon Peter. He said to him, “Lord, do you wash my feet?”

요한복음 13:7.content: Jesus answered him, “You don’t know what I am doing now, but you will understand later.”

요한복음 13:8.content: Peter said to him, “You will never wash my feet!” Jesus answered him, “If I don’t wash you, you have no part with me.”

요한복음 13:9.content: Simon Peter said to him, “Lord, not my feet only, but also my hands and my head!”

요한복음 13:10.content: Jesus said to him, “Someone who has bathed only needs to have his feet washed, but is completely clean. You are clean, but not all of you.”

요한복음 13:11.content: For he knew him who would betray him, therefore he said, “You are not all clean.”

요한복음 13:12.content: So when he had washed their feet, put his outer garment back on, and sat down again, he said to them, “Do you know what I have done to you?

요한복음 13:13.content: You call me, ‘Teacher’ and ‘Lord.’ You say so correctly, for so I am.

요한복음 13:14.content: If I then, the Lord and the Teacher, have washed your feet, you also ought to wash one another’s feet.

요한복음 13:15.content: For I have given you an example, that you should also do as I have done to you.

요한복음 13:16.content: Most certainly I tell you, a servant is not greater than his lord, neither is one who is sent greater than he who sent him.

요한복음 13:17.content: If you know these things, blessed are you if you do them.

요한복음 13:18.content: I don’t speak concerning all of you. I know whom I have chosen. But that the Scripture may be fulfilled, ‘He who eats bread with me has lifted up his heel against me.’

요한복음 13:19.content: From now on, I tell you before it happens, that when it happens, you may believe that I am he.

요한복음 13:20.content: Most certainly I tell you, he who receives whomever I send, receives me; and he who receives me, receives him who sent me.”

요한복음 13:21.content: When Jesus had said this, he was troubled in spirit, and testified, “Most certainly I tell you that one of you will betray me.”

요한복음 13:22.content: The disciples looked at one another, perplexed about whom he spoke.

요한복음 13:23.content: One of his disciples, whom Jesus loved, was at the table, leaning against Jesus’ breast.

요한복음 13:24.content: Simon Peter therefore beckoned to him, and said to him, “Tell us who it is of whom he speaks.”

요한복음 13:25.content: He, leaning back, as he was, on Jesus’ breast, asked him, “Lord, who is it?”

요한복음 13:26.content: Jesus therefore answered, “It is he to whom I will give this piece of bread when I have dipped it.” So when he had dipped the piece of bread, he gave it to Judas, the son of Simon Iscariot.

요한복음 13:27.content: After the piece of bread, then Satan entered into him. Then Jesus said to him, “What you do, do quickly.”

요한복음 13:28.content: Now nobody at the table knew why he said this to him.

요한복음 13:29.content: For some thought, because Judas had the money box, that Jesus said to him, “Buy what things we need for the feast,” or that he should give something to the poor.

요한복음 13:30.content: Therefore having received that morsel, he went out immediately. It was night.

요한복음 13:31.content: When he had gone out, Jesus said, “Now the Son of Man has been glorified, and God has been glorified in him.

요한복음 13:32.content: If God has been glorified in him, God will also glorify him in himself, and he will glorify him immediately.

요한복음 13:33.content: Little children, I will be with you a little while longer. You will seek me, and as I said to the Jews, ‘Where I am going, you can’t come,’ so now I tell you.

요한복음 13:34.content: A new commandment I give to you, that you love one another. Just as I have loved you, you also love one another.

요한복음 13:35.content: By this everyone will know that you are my disciples, if you have love for one another.”

요한복음 13:36.content: Simon Peter said to him, “Lord, where are you going?” Jesus answered, “Where I am going, you can’t follow now, but you will follow afterwards.”

요한복음 13:37.content: Peter said to him, “Lord, why can’t I follow you now? I will lay down my life for you.”

요한복음 13:38.content: Jesus answered him, “Will you lay down your life for me? Most certainly I tell you, the rooster won’t crow until you have denied me three times.
